import re
import nltk
from nltk.tokenize import word_tokenize
from nltk.corpus import stopwords
from nltk.stem import PorterStemmer
nltk.download('stopwords')

stop_words = set(stopwords.words('english'))

def analyze_user_preferences(user_preferences, item_features):
    # Extract user preference elements
    user_elements = re.findall(r'User Preference Elements: (.*)', user_preferences)[0]
    user_elements = word_tokenize(user_elements.lower())
    user_elements = [word for word in user_elements if word not in stop_words]

    # Extract item features
    item_features = re.findall(r'Positive Aspects: (.*)', item_features)[0]
